helpful: The provisioned petition and brief in opposition exposed the precise post-Hemani GVR dispute.
The CourtListener opinion endpoint confirmed Hemani's holding and vote alignment.
The statpack supplied paid-petition, circuit, relist, and CVSG base rates.
gaps: CourtListener docket search did not surface the three cited 2026 SCOTUS denial dockets.
notes: The corpus queries transferred substantial data but returned broad recent priors rather than close doctrinal comparators; the filed briefs and Hemani opinion did most of the predictive work.
